reasoning: Koren, we need to directly improve your lactate clearance and build a more robust aerobic base. suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Start with 6 minutes @ 201W, then 3 minutes @ 248W. Repeat 4 times, keeping focus sharp and cadence smooth.
